personal_info.name: Osama Alwaly
personal_info.title: AI Engineer | Software Engineer
personal_info.about_me: AI Engineer and software engineer building full-stack AI systems: LLM orchestration, RAG pipelines, embeddings, and production APIs (e.g. FastAPI). Equally strong shipping polished web interfaces with React, Next.js, and TypeScript—focused on observable stages, evaluation, and maintainable architecture.

experience.title: Intern – Electronics & Software Engineering
experience.company: Faculty of Engineering – Port Said University
description_points: Hands-on labs in electronics and applied engineering.
Practiced MATLAB for simulation and analysis.
Intro to software engineering: requirements and system design.

experience.title: Intern – Computer Networks
description_points: Configuration and troubleshooting of network infrastructure.

experience.title: Volunteer Speaker
experience.company: Pioneer of Success Initiative – Ministry of Youth and Sports
description_points: Delivered a live session on using LinkedIn for professional growth.
Showcased AI-powered tools for interview prep and job search.
Guided participants on CV optimization and online presence.

projects.name: SmartBrace
projects.short_description: AI-powered health monitoring ecosystem (bracelet + mobile + web).
projects.description: Built and deployed ML classification models (~90–95% accuracy) for real-time healthcare monitoring and disease prediction (stroke, autism, asthma). Integrated models with backend (FastAPI) and services for data flow.

projects.name: FitTrack (Gym Tracker)
projects.short_description: Web app for workouts, progress tracking, and plans.
projects.description: Next.js platform to log workouts, track progress, and manage personalized training plans with auth, animations, and responsive UI.

projects.name: UI/UX Design Collection
projects.short_description: A collection of mobile and web UI/UX projects showcasing clean layouts, structured flows, and modern visual identities.
projects.description: A unified set of UI/UX design projects including mobile applications, landing pages, and web interfaces. Each project focuses on user-centered design principles, clear information hierarchy, and visually consistent component systems. This category will continue expanding with new designs and interface concepts over time.

projects.name: Physio Therapy Web
projects.short_description: A modern, responsive website for a physiotherapy clinic featuring multi-page layout, dynamic content, and interactive user interface.
projects.description: This project is a fully responsive website developed for Dr. Marwan Hesham's physiotherapy clinic. Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, it includes essential pages such as Home, Services, About, and Contact. Content is dynamically loaded from JSON files for easy management, with interactive components, smooth navigation, and a clean, professional design focused on user experience and accessibility.
features: Responsive multi-page layout (Home, Services, About, Contact)

projects.name: Osama Blog - Full Stack Blog Management System
projects.short_description: A full-stack blog management system with responsive frontend and seamless CRUD functionality.
projects.description: This project is a complete blog management web application built with Next.js, Prisma, and BFF architecture. It includes a fully responsive frontend with dynamic blog posts, user authentication, and CRUD operations for posts. The backend uses Prisma ORM for data management, and BFF architecture ensures smooth communication between frontend and backend.
features: Prisma ORM for efficient database management
Clean, professional UI with seamless navigation

projects.name: E-Commerce Full Stack Application
projects.short_description: A full-stack e-commerce web application built with a modern frontend and a structured backend, covering the complete shopping flow.
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce web application created to demonstrate end-to-end development, from building a responsive frontend to implementing backend logic and database integration. The project focuses on real e-commerce functionality such as authentication, product browsing, cart operations, and order handling, with clean structure and scalable organization.

projects.name: QA E-Commerce Automation Portfolio
projects.short_description: QA-ready full-stack e-commerce app with backend validation, Selenium POM E2E tests, CI pipeline, and Docker setup.
projects.description: Comprehensive QA automation portfolio combining a Next.js frontend, Express API, Jest/Supertest backend tests, and Selenium end-to-end flows. Includes robust auth/cart/checkout edge-case handling, test artifacts, and CI jobs for backend, frontend build, and browser automation.
features: Selenium Page Object Model suite with headed/headless modes
Backend validation and auth/cart/checkout negative-case handling
Jest + Supertest API tests and CI workflow integration
Docker orchestration for frontend/backend local runs

projects.name: User & Order API QA Automation
projects.short_description: Express REST API with JWT auth, strict validation, Postman/Newman automation, Jest/Supertest tests, Docker, and CI.
projects.description: API-focused QA automation project centered on user/order flows with comprehensive payload validation, status/error coverage, and automated checks. Includes Postman collection execution via Newman, Jest/Supertest API tests, SQL-like integrity checks, and containerized runtime.
features: JWT-protected user and order endpoints with edge-case validation
Postman collection + Newman command execution for API regression
Jest and Supertest automated API test suite
Dockerized service with GitHub Actions CI workflow

projects.name: ATS AI System
projects.short_description: resume_job_parser — ATS-oriented AI system for parsing roles and CVs into comparable signals.
projects.description: End-to-end ATS-style intelligence: ingest job postings and résumés, embed and retrieve the most relevant chunks, then use an LLM to emit structured fields (skills, seniority, gaps) for recruiters or applicants. Designed around clear pipeline stages, evaluation hooks, and API boundaries suitable for automation.

projects.name: AI CRM Intelligence Module
projects.short_description: ai-first-crm-hcp-module — AI-first CRM intelligence for HCP workflows: context, retrieval, and guided actions.
projects.description: A CRM intelligence layer that listens to CRM signals, assembles account and interaction context, retrieves supporting knowledge, and proposes concise next steps for reps. Emphasizes guardrails, traceability, and pipeline-style decomposition so teams can evolve prompts and tools without losing observability.
features: Modular service boundaries for CRM webhooks

reviews.reviewText: Working with Osama Alwaly was a fantastic experience. The project was completed ahead of schedule, and the communication was excellent.
